overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city intersection in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring towering skyscrapers, elevated highways with anti-corporate graffiti, neon-lit storefronts, and street vendors. The player character pans to admire the architecture before walking along the wet streets past palm trees and commercial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with elevated highway and mega towers

events.description: camera pans left and tilts upward to focus on towering skyscrapers against hazy sky
view shifts to highlight mega building 07 and twisted tower emerging from fog

agents.ego_description: standing at the intersection, slowly panning left to examine the elevated highway graffiti and towering architecture

entered.detail: futuristic elevated transit structure with glowing red accent lights and graffiti reading CORPORATIONS MUST DIE
massive cylindrical tower with illuminated 07 signage near the top, partially obscured by fog
tall spiraling tower with blue horizontal stripes winding up its facade
large painted sign on the highway structure with political messaging

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rain-slicked futuristic intersection. The camera pans left and tilts up to reveal massive skyscrapers piercing through the haze, including a distinctive tower marked with 07. An elevated highway bridge spans the view, adorned with anti-corporate graffiti. The atmosphere is moody and cyberpunk, with wet asphalt reflecting the diffused afternoon light.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crosswalks and traffic signals

events.description: camera pans down from skyscrapers back to street level, beginning forward movement
tan sedan drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the wet intersection, navigating between crossing pedestrians and observing traffic

notable_agents.action: tan sedan driving through the intersection, headlights on

entered.detail: wide crosswalk with white striped markings on wet asphalt
tall pole with illuminated traffic signals showing red
commercial building with large illuminated billboard displaying 24/7 STORE in blue and yellow

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to street level and begins walking through the intersection. A tan sedan passes through the crosswalk ahead while pedestrians navigate the wet streets. The 24/7 Store building becomes visible on the right with its bright neon signage contrasting against the gray sky. Traffic lights and street infrastructure frame the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial boulevard with palm trees and neon storefronts

events.description: passing the 24/7 store building, moving from intersection into continuous street corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet multi-lane road, passing palm trees and observing the commercial storefronts

notable_agents.action: person in light clothing walking on the sidewalk parallel to the street

entered.detail: line of tall palm trees along the sidewalk edge, swaying slightly in the wind
modern angular street lights with orange glowing illumination

segments.scene_description: Walking along the rain-soaked commercial boulevard, the scene features a row of palm trees lining the right side and the massive 24/7 Store building now on the left. The wet asphalt creates mirror-like reflections of the neon signs and street lamps. The elevated highway recedes into the distance as the character moves forward through the light traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under elevated highway with street food vendor

events.description: approaching the Crestmont street vendor stall with yellow umbrella
walking past the vendor and continuing under the elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing the Crestmont food vendor, continuing along the sidewalk beneath the elevated tracks

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the Crestmont food stall counter under the yellow umbrella

entered.detail: street food stall with red and white striped barriers and a large yellow umbrella, labeled Crestmont
heavy concrete blocks with red and white stripes lining the sidewalk edge
temporary metal fencing with green and blue tarps behind the vendor stall

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves under the shelter of the elevated highway, approaching the Crestmont street food vendor with its distinctive yellow umbrella and red-white striped barriers. The lighting shifts to artificial sources under the overpass. The character walks past the vendor, where a NPC stands behind the counter, and continues along the concrete sidewalk lined with barrier blocks, moving deeper under the transit structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, atmospheric view of a rain-slicked futuristic intersection into the sheltered depths of an urban transit structure. It begins with a slow pan and tilt upward to reveal massive skyscrapers and an elevated highway adorned with anti-corporate graffiti piercing through a moody haze. As the camera returns to street level, it moves through the intersection past a tan sedan and pedestrians, with the bright neon signage of a 24/7 Store emerging against the gray sky. The scene then shifts into a walk along a commercial boulevard where palm trees and mirror-like reflections on the wet asphalt frame the path as the highway recedes into the distance. Finally, the camera moves under the shelter of the overpass, transitioning from diffused daylight to artificial lighting while passing a street food vendor with a yellow umbrella and red-white striped barriers.
